name: degoog-toolkit
description: SearXNG integrations and a growing collection of degoog plugins.
author: SoPat712

plugins.name: Sports Results
plugins.description: Shows live sports scores, schedules, and standings. Activates on natural queries like team names, 'premier league standings', or 'lakers vs warriors' when Natural language is enabled.

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description: Currency converter with live rates. Triggers on !cur / !currency / !convert and on bare natural queries like '100 usd to eur' when Natural language is enabled.

plugins.name: TMDB
plugins.description: Shows rich info panels for movies, TV shows, and actors. Activates on natural-language queries (e.g. 'la la land', 'emma stone') and on TMDB, IMDB, or Allocine links in search results.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Current weather with interactive charts (temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity), a 7-day forecast and configurable units. Supports !weather <city>, leading phrases like 'weather in rome', and trailing-keyword queries like 'rome weather' or 'london forecast today'.

plugins.name: Speedtest
plugins.description: Internet speed test with selectable servers, latency, and a circular gauge. Supports !speedtest (aliases !speed, !speed-test, !networkspeed, !internetspeed — disable the core built-in Speed Test command so this plugin can claim them), plus natural phrases like 'speed test', 'run a speedtest', or 'how fast is internet' when Natural language is enabled.

engines.name: SearXNG
engines.description: Search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Images
engines.description: Image search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG Videos
engines.description: Video search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG News
engines.description: News search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.

engines.name: SearXNG File
engines.description: File search through your SearXNG instance via the JSON API.
